title: cyclophyllum henriettiae
intro: Cyclophyllum henriettiae, also known as 'Henrietta's Wood', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Native to the tropical forests of Madagascar, this plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum henriettiae include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional Malagasy medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in the form of a paste or powder.
